name: architect-reference
description: The Claude Architect's Reference — cert-aligned to Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (domains D1–D5), backed by docs/research-program/. References the Agentic Systems Design book for design depth.

scripts.predev: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run build:tips --if-present && npm run build:exercises --if-present && npm run sync:glossary && npm run sync:series
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run build:tips --if-present && npm run build:exercises --if-present && npm run sync:glossary && npm run sync:series && npm run validate --if-present
